signals.headline: US-Iran Peace Talks Collapse in Pakistan After 21 Hours; No Deal Reached, Vance Announces End with Kushner Present | NO
signals.raw:
US-Iran Peace Talks Collapse in Pakistan After 21 Hours; No Deal Reached, Vance Announces End with Kushner Present | NO | HIGH confidence** [1][4]

US Vice President JD Vance, flanked by Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff, confirmed on April 12, 2026, that marathon direct talks in Islamabad failed due to Iran's refusal of US terms, including nuclear restrictions and Strait of Hormuz de-escalation.[1]
matched_markets: Will 40 ships transit the Strait of Hormuz on any day by April 30?
Will Jared Kushner have a diplomatic meeting with Iran by April 30?

signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (from 2.0% prior), missing forecasts of 2.4% | NO | MED confidence**  
This March figure, the most recent confirmed data from Statistics Korea, shows a modest uptick but remains near the Bank of Korea's 2% target amid Middle East-driven energy shocks.[1]
